history.en: Javanese are endlessly interested, intelligent and active. They tend to enjoy jumping to great heights, playing with fishing pole-type or other interactive toys and just generally investigating their surroundings. He will attempt to copy things you do, such as opening doors or drawers.
history.zh: 爪哇猫无限好奇、聪明且活跃。它们喜欢跳得很高，玩钓鱼竿型或其他互动玩具，并通常只是调查周围环境。它会尝试模仿你做的事情，比如开门或抽屉。

overview.en: The Javanese is a strikingly elegant and intelligent cat breed, known for its silky, medium-length coat and vibrant personality. These cats are endlessly curious, active, and devoted to their human companions. They thrive on interaction and are often described as dog-like in their loyalty, following their owners from room to room. Javanese cats are playful and athletic, enjoying high jumps and interactive games. They are also highly vocal, communicating their needs and desires with a soft, melodic voice. Their social nature means they do best in homes where they receive plenty of attention and mental stimulation. While they are affectionate, they are not typically lap cats; instead, they prefer to be involved in whatever you are doing. Their intelligence can lead to mischievous behavior, such as opening cabinets or turning on faucets. Overall, the Javanese is a delightful, engaging companion that brings energy and joy to any household.
overview.zh: 爪哇猫是一种优雅而聪明的猫种，以其丝滑的中长毛发和活泼的个性而闻名。它们充满好奇心、活跃且对主人忠诚，常被描述为具有狗般的忠诚度，会跟随主人从一个房间到另一个房间。爪哇猫好动且运动能力强，喜欢跳高和互动游戏。它们也非常善于表达，用柔和悦耳的声音与主人沟通。它们的社会性天性意味着它们最适合在能获得大量关注和精神刺激的家庭中生活。虽然它们很亲昵，但通常不是那种喜欢长时间待在腿上的猫，而是更愿意参与你正在做的任何事情。它们的聪慧可能导致一些淘气行为，比如打开柜门或拧开水龙头。总的来说，爪哇猫是一种迷人、有趣的伙伴，能为任何家庭带来活力和欢乐。

care.en: Daily care for a Javanese cat involves several key routines. Grooming is relatively low-maintenance despite their semi-long coat; a weekly brushing with a stainless steel comb or slicker brush is sufficient to remove loose hair and prevent tangles. They shed minimally, but regular brushing keeps their coat glossy. Exercise is crucial for this active breed—provide at least 30 minutes of interactive play daily using wand toys, laser pointers, or puzzle feeders. They love to climb, so cat trees or wall shelves are excellent investments. Veterinary visits should be annual for check-ups and vaccinations, with dental cleanings as recommended. Regular nail trimming every two weeks and ear cleaning monthly are essential. Because they are prone to obesity if under-exercised, monitor their weight and adjust food intake accordingly. Mental stimulation is just as important as physical activity; rotate toys frequently and consider clicker training to keep their sharp minds engaged.
care.zh: 爪哇猫的日常护理包括几个关键事项。尽管它们有半长毛发，但梳理相对简单——每周用不锈钢梳或针梳梳理一次即可去除死毛并防止打结。它们掉毛不多，但定期梳理能保持毛发亮泽。运动对这种活跃的猫种至关重要——每天至少提供30分钟的互动游戏，使用逗猫棒、激光笔或益智喂食器。它们喜欢攀爬，因此猫爬架或壁挂架是不错的投资。每年应进行一次兽医体检和疫苗接种，并根据建议进行牙齿清洁。每两周修剪指甲，每月清洁耳朵也是必要的。由于它们容易因运动不足而肥胖，需监测体重并调整食量。精神刺激与身体活动同样重要；经常更换玩具，并考虑响片训练以保持它们敏锐的思维活跃。

training.en: Training a Javanese cat is a rewarding experience due to their high intelligence and eagerness to please. Positive reinforcement methods work best—use treats, praise, or clicker training to reward desired behaviors. They are quick learners and can master tricks like 'sit', 'high five', or fetch. Start training early, ideally as kittens, to establish good habits. Consistency is key; use the same cues and commands each time. Because they are naturally curious and mimic human actions, you can teach them to open doors or drawers on command, but be mindful of safety. Redirect undesirable behaviors like counter-surfing by providing acceptable alternatives, such as a designated climbing post. Short, frequent sessions of 5–10 minutes are more effective than long ones. Socialization is also part of training—expose them to different people, pets, and environments gradually to build confidence. Their vocal nature means they can also learn to 'speak' on cue, adding to the fun.
training.zh: 训练爪哇猫是一种有益的体验，因为它们非常聪明且渴望取悦主人。正向强化法效果最好——使用零食、表扬或响片训练来奖励期望的行为。它们学习速度快，能掌握“坐下”、“击掌”或捡回物品等技巧。最好从小猫时期开始训练，以建立良好习惯。一致性是关键；每次使用相同的提示和指令。由于它们天生好奇且模仿人类行为，你可以教它们按指令开门或开抽屉，但要注意安全。通过提供可接受的替代方案（如指定的攀爬柱）来转移如跳上柜台等不良行为。短而频繁的5–10分钟训练比长时间训练更有效。社会化也是训练的一部分——逐渐让它们接触不同的人、宠物和环境，以建立自信。它们善于发声的天性也意味着可以学会在提示时“说话”，增加训练的乐趣。

diet.en: Feeding a Javanese cat requires a balanced, high-quality diet to support their active lifestyle. Choose a commercial cat food that lists a named protein source (like chicken or fish) as the first ingredient, with moderate fat and low carbohydrates. Both dry and wet food can be offered, but wet food helps maintain hydration and urinary health. Portion control is important—adult Javanese typically need 1/3 to 1/2 cup of dry food per day, divided into two meals, or the equivalent in wet food. Treats should not exceed 10% of daily calories. Because they are prone to weight gain, monitor their body condition and adjust portions as needed. Fresh water must always be available; consider a pet fountain to encourage drinking. Some Javanese may have sensitive stomachs, so introduce new foods gradually over a week. Consult your vet for specific recommendations based on age, weight, and activity level. Avoid feeding table scraps or foods toxic to cats, like onions or chocolate.
diet.zh: 喂养爪哇猫需要均衡、高质量的饮食，以支持它们活跃的生活方式。选择商业猫粮时，应确保第一种成分是明确的蛋白质来源（如鸡肉或鱼肉），并含有适中的脂肪和较低的碳水化合物。干粮和湿粮都可以提供，但湿粮有助于保持水分摄入和泌尿健康。控制食量很重要——成年爪哇猫通常每天需要1/3到1/2杯干粮，分两餐喂食，或等量的湿粮。零食不应超过每日热量的10%。由于它们容易发胖，需监测体况并调整食量。始终提供新鲜饮水；考虑使用宠物饮水机以鼓励喝水。有些爪哇猫可能有敏感的肠胃，因此新食物应在一周内逐渐引入。根据年龄、体重和活动水平，咨询兽医获取具体建议。避免喂食剩饭或对猫有毒的食物，如洋葱或巧克力。

livingTips.en: The Javanese cat adapts well to various living environments, including apartments, provided they have enough vertical space and stimulation. They are not strictly indoor cats, but for safety, a secure outdoor enclosure or supervised leash walks are recommended. Their high energy means they need ample climbing opportunities—cat trees, shelves, or window perches are ideal. They get along well with children who respect their boundaries and with other pets, especially if introduced gradually. However, their playful nature may be too intense for very young toddlers. They thrive in homes where someone is present most of the day, as they dislike being left alone for long periods. If you work long hours, consider adopting a second cat for companionship. Javanese are also known for their curiosity, so cat-proof your home by securing cabinets, covering electrical cords, and removing toxic plants. Overall, they are a wonderful fit for active families or individuals who can dedicate time to interaction.
livingTips.zh: 爪哇猫能很好地适应各种生活环境，包括公寓，只要它们有足够的垂直空间和刺激。它们并非严格的室内猫，但为了安全，建议使用安全的户外围栏或监督下的牵引绳散步。它们精力充沛，需要大量攀爬机会——猫爬架、架子或窗台是理想选择。它们与尊重它们界限的孩子以及其他宠物相处融洽，尤其是逐渐介绍的情况下。然而，它们好玩的性格可能对非常小的幼儿来说过于激烈。它们最适合白天大部分时间有人在家的家庭，因为不喜欢长时间独处。如果你工作繁忙，可以考虑养第二只猫作为陪伴。爪哇猫以好奇心著称，因此要通过固定柜门、遮盖电线、移除有毒植物来做好家居防护。总的来说，它们非常适合活跃的家庭或个人，只要主人能投入时间与它们互动。
